ROSENDIN · HSE INTAKE v16.draw
—

Rapid incident intake

One form → Six documents
0 / 8
Step 01
Classify the incident
Different incident types require different documents. Pick the one that best fits.
1.1

Date, Time & Location

Step 02
Person involved
Identity and contact info for the injured worker (or primary person involved).
2.1

Supervision

Recommended — these three fields populate across every form (FROI, FIQ, IR). Skipping them leaves blanks in multiple places.
Step 03
Injury details
Skip the injury-specific fields if this isn't an injury incident.
Step 04
What happened
Narrative of the event. One detailed description will populate all six forms.
Step 05
Procedures & training
Compliance-critical. OSHA and Rosendin both care about these answers.
Step 06
Work schedule & fatigue
Fatigue is a leading contributor. These answers matter for root cause.
6.1

Supervision span

Step 07
Witnesses & prevention
Add every witness you've talked to. Each one becomes their own Witness Questionnaire + Witness Statement.
7.1

Prevention

Step 08
Review & generate
Quick glance at everything. Tap any section to jump back and edit.
✓
Complete
Documents ready
All applicable forms have been generated from your intake.
Saved

AI-polished version

Review before applying — facts unchanged, language refined
